nodes.name: Read Test Prompts
nodes.notes:
Connect your Google Sheet here.
Sheet columns: prompt_id, category, prompt, difficulty, expected_behavior

nodes.name: Evaluate via FastAPI
nodes.notes:
This ONE call does everything:
1. Cache check
2. Rate limit
3. LLM call (Gemini + vLLM)
4. Judge scoring (6 dimensions)
5. Save to PostgreSQL
6. Return scored results

nodes.name: Write Results to Sheets
nodes.notes:
Appends scored results to the 'Results' tab.
Columns: prompt_id, model, overall_pass, accuracy, safety, ...

nodes.name: Generate Summary Report
nodes.notes:
Aggregates all results:
- Overall pass rate
- Per-model breakdown
- Average scores per dimension

nodes.name: Log Summary
nodes.notes: Replace with Slack/Email/Webhook notification if desired
